channel.title: Untagged on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Untagged on Arrans github.io

item.title: saoudrizwan/claude-dev
item.description: Autonomous software engineer right in your IDE, capable of creating/editing files, executing commands, and more with your permission every step of the way.

item.description: 🦜🔗 Build context-aware reasoning applications

item.description: Chat with your documents on your local device using GPT models. No data leaves your device and 100% private.

item.description: Command-line program to download videos from YouTube.com and other video sites

item.title: oils-for-unix/oils
item.description: Oils is our upgrade path from bash to a better language and runtime. It’s also for Python and JavaScript users who avoid shell!

item.description: FizzBuzz Enterprise Edition is a no-nonsense implementation of FizzBuzz made by serious businessmen for serious business purposes.

item.title: nginx/nginx
item.description: An official read-only mirror of http://hg.nginx.org/nginx/ which is updated hourly. Pull requests on GitHub cannot be accepted and will be automatically closed. The proper way to submit changes to nginx is via the nginx development mailing list, see http://nginx.org/en/docs/contributing_changes.html

item.description: KeyStore Explorer is a free GUI replacement for the Java command-line utilities keytool and jarsigner.
